task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or home screen is visible, and the logged-in user profile indicates 'administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Problem module and opened the form to create a new Problem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Problem' creation form or page is visible within the ServiceDesk Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Title for the Problem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field contains exactly 'Recurring network outages affecting multiple departments'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Description for the Problem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains exactly 'Multiple service requests related to network connectivity issues have been received over the past week. Root cause investigation required.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the Impact level to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Impact dropdown or selection field is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the Urgency level to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Urgency dropdown or selection field is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved and successfully created the Problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the Problem was created, the saved Problem details view showing the entered information, or the new Problem appearing in the Problems list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus application, not a text editor, mock UI, or local document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface to create the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of clicking buttons, typing in text fields, and selecting dropdowns in the browser, rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the record was genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screen shows the system-generated Problem ID or the standard ServiceDesk Plus record view, not just typed text in an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Recurring network outages affecting multiple departments'. Expected Description: 'Multiple service requests related to network connectivity issues have been received over the past week. Root cause investigation required.'. Expected Impact: 'High'. Expected Urgency: 'High'.
